description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted in a dynamic walking pose. The figure is dressed in a fitted jacket and long pants, with the jacket featuring a high collar and the pants appearing straight-cut. The arms are bent at the elbows, with one arm swinging forward and the other back, suggesting mid-stride movement. The head is slightly tilted, and the figure's proportions are realistic, with visible definition in the limbs and torso. The shoes are low-profile and streamlined, suitable for urban walking. The overall form is slender and athletic, with no visible accessories or carried items.
description: A slender adult pedestrian in a fitted jacket and long pants, mid-stride with arms swinging and wearing low-profile shoes.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the forward-swinging right arm and the high-collared jacket.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the stride and the straight-cut pants, with the left leg forward.
description_view_2: Rear-right view showing the back of the jacket and the backward-swinging left arm.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the right leg forward and the overall walking posture.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted jacket and long straight-cut pants
